title: PibbleCraft
description: Balance of combat, fun, and quality of life mods. PibbleCraft for Fabric 1.21.1
body:
![PibbleCraft Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4262609eac542b69e5958cd3655c361cd62e35e9.png)

### **A fun modpack that adds pibbles, guns, roller coasters, and so much more!**

PibbleCraft is an exciting modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 on Fabric, designed to deliver a balance of adventure, creativity, and quality-of-life improvements. With mods that expand everything from exploration and combat to crafting and building, PibbleCraft gives a more immersive Minecraft experience.
